name: Moonshine v2 Medium Shallow-Fusion Feasibility Assessment
short_description: Shallow-fusion biasing feasibility assessment for Moonshine Streaming Medium on gold-92, documenting 3 candidate approaches, effort estimates, and a feasibility verdict. No per-clip inference run.
model_description: Moonshine v2 Medium — shallow fusion feasibility assessment (no inference run)
prediction_schema: Assessment document only — no per-clip predictions. See files/shallow_fusion_feasibility.md.

files.description: Shallow-fusion feasibility assessment covering 3 candidate approaches (log-linear LM, CTC beam-search hotword boosting, N-best rescoring), effort estimates, and feasibility verdict.
